name.value: WinMerge - You will see the difference…

value.value: WinMerge - You will see the difference…

name.value: differencing and merging tool for Windows. WinMerge can compare both folders and files, presenting differences in a visual text format that is easy to understand and handle.

value.value: differencing and merging tool for Windows. WinMerge can compare both folders and files, presenting differences in a visual text format that is easy to understand and handle.

name.value: WinMerge is highly useful for determining what has changed between project versions, and then merging changes between versions. WinMerge can be used as an external differencing/merging tool or as a standalone application.

value.value: WinMerge is highly useful for determining what has changed between project versions, and then merging changes between versions. WinMerge can be used as an external differencing/merging tool or as a standalone application.

name.value: In addition, WinMerge has many helpful supporting features that make comparing, synchronising, and merging as easy and useful as possible:

value.value: In addition, WinMerge has many helpful supporting features that make comparing, synchronising, and merging as easy and useful as possible:

name.value: is the latest stable version, and is recommended for most users.

value.value: is the latest stable version, and is recommended for most users.

value.value: If you need support, look at our

name.value: WinMerge is an open source project, which means that the program is maintained and developed by volunteers.

value.value: WinMerge is an open source project, which means that the program is maintained and developed by volunteers.

name.value: In addition, WinMerge is translated into a number of different languages. See our

value.value: In addition, WinMerge is translated into a number of different languages. See our

name.value: Supports Microsoft Windows XP SP3 or newer

value.value: Supports Microsoft Windows XP SP3 or newer

name.value: Handles Windows, Unix and Mac text file formats

value.value: Handles Windows, Unix and Mac text file formats

name.value: Visual differencing and merging of text files

value.value: Visual differencing and merging of text files

name.value: Flexible editor with syntax highlighting, line numbers and word-wrap

value.value: Flexible editor with syntax highlighting, line numbers and word-wrap

name.value: Difference pane shows current difference in two vertical panes

value.value: Difference pane shows current difference in two vertical panes

name.value: Location pane shows map of files compared

value.value: Location pane shows map of files compared

name.value: Regular Expression based file filters allow excluding and including items

value.value: Regular Expression based file filters allow excluding and including items

name.value: Fast compare using file sizes and dates

value.value: Fast compare using file sizes and dates

name.value: Compares one folder or includes all subfolders

value.value: Compares one folder or includes all subfolders

name.value: Can show folder compare results in a tree-style view

value.value: Can show folder compare results in a tree-style view

name.value: Can highlight the differences with blocks

value.value: Can highlight the differences with blocks

name.value: Overlaying of the pictures is possible

value.value: Overlaying of the pictures is possible

name.value: Shows CSV/TSV file contents in table format

value.value: Shows CSV/TSV file contents in table format
